School of Hospitality

Apply to join Global College today >

Explore courses at the Global Technical College>

Explore events at the Global Technical College >

Looking for top-quality hospitality courses in Kenya? At Global Technical College, our School of Hospitality is committed to preparing students for exciting careers in hotels, restaurants, tourism, and the broader service industry. We combine practical skills, industry knowledge, and professional training to ensure our graduates are ready to succeed in the fast-paced world of hospitality.

Our programs go beyond the basics — offering hands-on training in real-world environments, exposure to industry best practices, and mentorship from experienced professionals. Whether you dream of managing a luxury hotel, running your own restaurant, or excelling in event management, we’ll give you the skills and confidence to make it happen.

What Makes Our Hospitality Courses in Kenya Unique?

  • Industry-Relevant Curriculum: Learn the latest trends and techniques in hospitality management, culinary arts, and customer service.
  • Hands-On Experience: Train in fully equipped kitchens, mock hotel setups, and event spaces.
  • Expert Faculty: Gain insights from instructors with years of real-world experience in hospitality and tourism.
  • Career Pathways: Open doors to roles in hotels, resorts, cruise ships, airlines, and more.
  • Recognized Certification: Graduate with a qualification respected by employers across Kenya and beyond.

 

Courses Offered

Specialized Short Courses

  • Professional Cookery & Culinary Arts
  • Event Planning & Management
  • Barista Training & Beverage Service
  • Housekeeping & Laundry Operations
  • Restaurant and Catering Management

Eastleigh, 2nd Avenue, Section 1 Eastleigh, Nairobi – Kenya

+254799925625 info@globalcollege.ac.ke

Mon – Fri 9:00A.M. – 5:00P.M.

Apply now

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.
